allow: Bash(node -e "const { TOTP, generateSecret, generateURI, verify } = require\(''otplib''\); console.log\(typeof TOTP, typeof generateSecret, typeof generateURI, typeof verify\)")

Bash(node -e "const { generateSecret, generateURI, verify } = require\(''otplib''\); const s = generateSecret\(\); console.log\(''secret:'', s\); const uri = generateURI\(''test@test.com'', ''App'', s\); console.log\(''uri:'', uri\);")

Bash(node -e "const { TOTP, generateSecret } = require\(''otplib''\); const t = new TOTP\(\); const s = generateSecret\(\); console.log\(''secret:'', s\); const uri = t.keyuri\(''test@test.com'', ''App'', s\); console.log\(''uri:'', uri\); const code = t.generate\(s\); const ok = t.verify\({token: code, secret: s}\); console.log\(''verify:'', ok\);")
Bash(node -e "const o = require\(''otplib''\); const t = new o.TOTP\(\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(t\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const { TOTP, generateSecret } = require\(''otplib''\); const t = new TOTP\(\); const s = t.generateSecret\(\); const uri = t.toURI\({ label: ''test@test.com'', issuer: ''App'', secret: s }\); console.log\(''uri:'', uri\); const code = t.generate\(s\); const ok = t.verify\({token: code, secret: s}\); console.log\(''ok:'', ok\);")

Bash(node -e "const { generateSecret, generate, verify, generateURI } = require\(''otplib''\); const s = generateSecret\(\); console.log\(''s:'', s\); const uri = generateURI\({ label: ''test@test.com'', issuer: ''App'', secret: s }\); console.log\(''uri:'', uri\); const code = generate\(s\); console.log\(''code:'', code\); const ok = verify\({ token: code, secret: s }\); console.log\(''ok:'', ok\);")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "d:\\projects\\smart-business-accounts\\app\\dashboard" -Recurse -Directory | Where-Object { -not \($_.GetFiles\(\) | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "^page\\." }\) } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.Replace\('d:\\projects\\smart-business-accounts\\', ''\) })

PowerShell($pages = Get-ChildItem -Path "d:\\projects\\smart-business-accounts\\app" -Recurse -File -Filter "page.tsx" | Measure-Object; $layouts = Get-ChildItem -Path "d:\\projects\\smart-business-accounts\\app" -Recurse -File -Filter "layout.tsx" | Measure-Object; Write-Host "Total Pages \(page.tsx\): $\($pages.Count\)"; Write-Host "Total Layouts \(layout.tsx\): $\($layouts.Count\)")

PowerShell($apiRoutes = Get-ChildItem -Path "d:\\projects\\smart-business-accounts\\app\\api" -Recurse -File -Filter "route.ts" | Group-Object { Split-Path -Parent $_.FullName } | ForEach-Object { $_.Count } | Measure-Object -Sum; Write-Host "Total API route files: $\($apiRoutes.Sum\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**p.get\('dependencies',{}\), **p.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(f'{k}: {v}'\) for k in ['axios','ws','svix','resend','@aws-sdk/client-s3'] if k in deps]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; print\('\\n'.join\(f'{k}: {v}' for k,v in sorted\(deps.items\(\)\)\)\)")
